Rotary Potentiometer Linear Taper, WH148, 15mm, 3-Pin, with Black Aluminium Knobs

From £3

Upgrade your electronics projects with this comprehensive WH148 linear taper rotary potentiometer kit. Each potentiometer features a precise 15mm design with 3-pin configuration, offering multiple resistance options from 1K to 1M ohms. The set includes resistance values of 1K, 2K, 5K, 10K, 20K, 50K, 100K, 250K, and 1M, making it versatile for various applications.

Upgrade your electronics projects with this comprehensive WH148 linear taper rotary potentiometer kit. Each potentiometer features a precise 15mm design with 3-pin configuration, offering multiple resistance options from 1K to 1M ohms. The set includes resistance values of 1K, 2K, 5K, 10K, 20K, 50K, 100K, 250K, and 1M, making it versatile for various applications. The included black aluminium knobs provide smooth rotation control and add a professional finish to your projects. These potentiometers are ideal for audio equipment, control panels, and DIY electronics applications where variable resistance control is needed. The linear taper design ensures consistent resistance change throughout the rotation range, allowing for precise adjustments. Perfect for hobbyists, engineers, and makers working on custom electronics projects.

DhivanSTech

  • DhivanSTech

    DhivanSTech (DST) is an electronics brand supplying tested DIY maker components and test equipment via Amazon. We also document real builds, experiments, and engineering projects.
